channel.title: GitHub Trending - Aggiornati di recente in All Languages (Daily)
channel.description: Repository (Aggiornati di recente) più popolari in All Languages nel periodo daily.

item.title: 🟦 freeCodeCamp/freeCodeCamp (442252 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: freeCodeCamp

📝 Repository: freeCodeCamp/freeCodeCamp

📄 Descrizione: freeCodeCamp.org's open-source codebase and curriculum. Learn math, programming, and computer science for free.

🍴 Forks: 44194

🏷️ Topics: careers certification community curriculum d3 education freecodecamp javascript learn-to-code math nodejs nonprofits programming react teachers

📜 Licenza: BSD 3-Clause "New" or "Revised" License

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-09T04:23:00Z

]]>
